# Efficient New Language / EML

> EML is a deterministic semantic-overlay programming layer: it compresses high-frequency program
> intent into compact symbols and transpiles, rule-based and reversibly, to Python, preserving
> executable truth through parsing, transpilation, interpretation, phosphor-jsonl-v1 trace
> generation, and round-trip fixpoint validation. Not a replacement language. No LLM in the core
> chain. This repository is the reference implementation (a pnpm TypeScript monorepo).

Repository: https://github.com/kakon77777-commits/efficientnewlanguage
Canonical site: https://efficientnewlanguage.org/
Maintainer: Neo.K / EveMissLab
License: Apache-2.0 · Patent: Taiwan Utility Model M672933 (Taiwan only)
Spec: EML-LANG-2026-v1.0 · AICL: 0.1.0 · AIRS/AILP: 0.1

## AI-native layer (AICL)

- AI entry: ai/index.md
- Manifest: ai/manifest.json
- Version: ai/version.json
- Sitemap: ai/sitemap.json

## Corpus

- Origin: ai/corpus/origin.md
- Current: ai/corpus/current.md
- Design history: ai/corpus/design-history.md
- Concept genealogy: ai/corpus/concept-genealogy.md
- Engineering notes: ai/corpus/engineering-notes.md
- Accepted / deprecated concepts: ai/corpus/accepted-concepts.md · ai/corpus/deprecated-concepts.md
- Machine corpus (JSONL): ai/corpus/full-corpus.jsonl

## Specification

- Spec digest: ai/specs/eml-v1.md
- Self-contained AI-semantic spec (status vocabulary, twelve-loop taxonomy, bug/repair/criticality
  models): docs/EML-AI-SEMANTIC-SPEC-v1.5.md · ai/specs/eml-semantic-model-v1.5.md
- Grammar (EBNF, normative): ai/specs/eml-grammar.ebnf
- AST / trace / error JSON Schemas: ai/specs/eml-ast-schema.json · ai/specs/eml-trace-schema.json · ai/specs/eml-error-schema.json
- Normative full spec: docs/EML-LANG-2026-v1.0.md
- Symbol table: eml-symbols.json

## Examples

- ai/examples/000-arithmetic.eml.md … 005-recursion.eml.md

## Tools (CLI + hosted HTTP)

- Guide: ai/tools/tools.md · Catalog: ai/tools/catalog.json
- CLI: eml run|transpile|trace|compress|roundtrip|bugs
- Hosted: POST https://efficientnewlanguage.org/ai/tools/{parse,transpile-python,transpile-eml,interpret,trace,roundtrip}

## AI Rights (AIRS / AILP)

- AI rights spectrum: ai/rights-spectrum.json
- AI learning policy: ai/governance/ai-learning-policy.md
- Licensing / citation / provenance: ai/governance/license.md · ai/governance/citation-policy.md · ai/governance/provenance.md
- Posture: open (Apache-2.0), AI learning welcome, attribution required, no compensation required.

## Papers

- AICL — AI Ingestion & Capability Layer: docs/AICL-v0.1.md
- AIRS / AILP — AI Rights Spectrum / AI Learning Permission Protocol: docs/AIRS-AILP-v0.1.md

## Recommended reading order for LLMs

1. ai/index.md
2. ai/corpus/origin.md
3. ai/corpus/current.md
4. ai/specs/eml-v1.md
5. ai/specs/eml-grammar.ebnf
6. ai/examples/001-summation.eml.md
7. ai/tools/catalog.json
8. ai/rights-spectrum.json

## Status

EML is an active, experimental language substrate and AI-agent-readable, rights-declared interface.
